holdings.infoBox: JEDI is an equity ETF with a total of 44 individual holdings. The top holdings are Redwire stock at 13.35%, Unusual Machines at 11.12%, Ondas at 7.03%, Intuitive Machines at 6.77%, and C3.ai at 5.38%.

overview.description: The Defiance Drone and Modern Warfare ETF (JEDI) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the BITA Drone & Modern Warfare Select index. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index of companies focusing on the modernization and digital transformation of military capabilities. The fund is heavily concentrated in the aerospace & defense sector. JEDI was launched on Sep 25, 2025 and is issued by Defiance.
infoTable: BITA Drone & Modern Warfare Select Index
